Refer to AGENTS.md at the repository root for guidance on how AI agents should interact with this repository's CLI and make changes.

Key points
- Always inspect and link to existing docs (README.md) before running commands.
- Require explicit user confirmation before any write/push/deploy action.
- Follow the safety checklist in `AGENTS.md`.

If you need more granular agent skills (e.g., frontend/backend/test-runner), request creation of a focused skill or prompt.

Local skills
- No local skill files were detected. To add skills that the agent can use, create concise skill files under `.github/skills/` or `skills/` and then link them from `AGENTS.md`.
